flametongue.name: Flametongue
flametongue.description: Wreathe a weapon in flame — it deals fire damage.

frostbrand.name: Frostbrand
frostbrand.description: Sheathe a weapon in biting cold.

keen_edge.name: Keen Edge
keen_edge.description: Hone a weapon to an unnatural sharpness (+1 damage).

vampiric.name: Vampiric
vampiric.description: A blade that hungers, dealing necrotic wounds.

holy_blessing.name: Holy Blessing
holy_blessing.description: Sanctify a weapon to sear the wicked.

warding.name: Warding
warding.description: Reinforce armour with a protective ward (+1 AC).

of_vitality.name: of Vitality
of_vitality.description: Bind a spark of life into worn gear (+6 max HP).

of_the_magi.name: of the Magi
of_the_magi.description: Weave arcane power into worn gear (+5 mana, +1 mana regen).
